steps.title: Handle however between clauses
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Chambers being known for Sugar Hill Records with the fact that he did not play on the label's classic song. The correct punctuation keeps however as a parenthetical after the first independent clause and uses a semicolon before the next independent clause.

steps.title: Reject quotation boundary errors
steps.content: Choice A makes however introduce the second sentence, shifting the contrast to the wrong clause. Choice C joins two independent clauses with only commas. Choice D gives no punctuation around however or between the clauses. The answer is B.
